blocked_by: The checkpoint has no explicit ownership or usage terms sufficient to pass the frozen research-use license gate.
The external source defines dataset-specific loaders and binarizer ridge widths, but no authoritative preprocessing path for an unknown SD300 image.
The external source has no PPI input or physical resampling rule for the 1000-PPI SD300b and 2000-PPI SD300c images; selecting a pixel-domain policy would be arbitrary.

sd300_preprocessing.image_decoder: OpenCV grayscale is used by known source loaders, but there is no SD300 loader.
sd300_preprocessing.contrast_enhancement: dataset-specific Gabor binarization with different fixed ridge-width parameters
sd300_preprocessing.normalization: known loaders convert uint8 to a single-channel float tensor in approximately [0,1]
sd300_preprocessing.resize: known loaders eventually target 299x299, but crop/pad order differs by dataset
sd300_preprocessing.crop: dataset-specific; SFinGe removes 32 bottom rows, MCYT optical center-crops a fixed ROI, other loaders do not
sd300_preprocessing.padding: square padding is used by several paths with fill 0 or 1 depending on the loader
sd300_preprocessing.localization: not present in the verified checkpoint variant
sd300_preprocessing.interpolation: torchvision antialiased resize in known paths

embedding_validity.blocked_by: SD300 preprocessing and PPI gates failed before inference.

technical_source_example_inference.scope: two source-provided SFinGe examples using the source-defined SFinGe testing path; not SD300 evidence
technical_source_example_inference.preprocessing: cv2.IMREAD_GRAYSCALE; remove final 32 rows; ToTensor; LazilyAllocatedBinarizer(ridge_width=5.0); square-pad with fill=0; torchvision antialiased resize to 299x299
